state.description: Current state of the Connect Four game

fields.board: list of 6 rows, each a list of 7 atoms, each empty | red | yellow. Row 1=top, Col 1=left
fields.current_player: atom, either red or yellow, indicates whose turn it is

move.description: Drop one checker into the specified column

parameters.column: integer between 1 and 7 representing the column to drop into

legal_move_conditions: nth1(1, Board, TopRow), nth1(Column, TopRow, Cell), Cell = empty
apply_move_effects: Let Row be the highest index from 6 down to 1 such that nth1(Row, Board, RowList), nth1(Column, RowList, empty)
Update Board by setting the cell at (Row, Column) to current_player
Set current_player to the other player (if red then yellow else red)
win_conditions: There exist Row, Col such that cells at (Row,Col),(Row,Col+1),(Row,Col+2),(Row,Col+3) are equal to current_player
There exist Row, Col such that cells at (Row,Col),(Row+1,Col),(Row+2,Col),(Row+3,Col) are equal to current_player
There exist Row, Col such that cells at (Row,Col),(Row+1,Col+1),(Row+2,Col+2),(Row+3,Col+3) are equal to current_player
There exist Row, Col such that cells at (Row,Col),(Row-1,Col+1),(Row-2,Col+2),(Row-3,Col+3) are equal to current_player
draw_conditions: All cells in Board are not empty and no win condition holds
end_conditions: A player satisfies a win condition
